title: Law students who don't attend a single class can't benefit from attendance norm relaxation: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court on May 14 denied relief to law student seeking to be admitted to the next semester without having attended the classes and examinations of the previous semester [Aman Bansal v. University of Delhi].A Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra K Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia held that the benefit of In Re Sushant Rohilla, which allowed leniency for students falling short of attendance, was not meant for students who don't attend a single class."In view of the above, the App
